textByHash.67a1e458d8e2333cfa28ec8bd383112d7a9dd20c: Well, I just ran past them as fast as I could.
textByHash.7377bc28d5b684e5f6f59706fd4ca214f7cbe545: Don't you think this place is so fascinating? It looks like this cave is a major habitat for the giants.
textByHash.7ccdb1990ae3978389591dc764e77086243bc7b1: Anyway, I'd better get back to my research.
textByHash.bf08c1f361c0cbc50b0a211e0e7e2b1eff4cc068: Adventurer? No. I'm a natural historian from Varrock. I'm working on a project to research the creatures of Kourend.
